title: アオハル杯4戦目・強豪チーム、撃破！

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: We did it! We really beat that super-strong team!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
That means we're also super strong, right?
Hehe! ♪

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
If we keep this up, maybe we can win next time,
too...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh, what am I saying? We will win again!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Right! And everyone on our team seems just as
motivated!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Next up... we have to face Team Zenith!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'm a little surprised that I'm not feeling nervous.
If anything, I'm so excited, I could take off
running right here and now!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Let's give the final showdown all we've got!

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: ...Huh. Who'd have thought they could beat a team that good.

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
Don't let it get to you! We're plenty determined
ourselves.

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
As long as we stay resolved and keep our noses to
the grindstone, we'll get faster and faster!
